form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 2nd of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 6 over 3200m, 1.3 len behind Now The Eagle carrying 59kg at $6. The race before that scored a big 5.5 len win at Chelmsford March 7 over 2800m defeating Queensland Boy with 57.5kg at $4. Well placed. Sure to prove tough to beat.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 14 at Chepstow October 11 over 3900m, 34 len behind Rambo T carrying 69.5kg at $13. Previously first up; third of 9 at Ludlow February 19 2025 over 3200m, 7 len behind Continuance carrying 75.5kg at $2.50. In the mix on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a mistake jumping the last hurdle.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 7th of 9 at this track on January 22 over 2800m, 4 len behind Prince Quattro carrying 63kg at $9.50. When resuming last campaign 6th of 14 at this track on September 2 over 2200m, 14 len behind Race To The Stars with 62kg at $81. Can run a bold race.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start ran last of 8 at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 2400m, 23 len behind Yaa Min carrying 60kg at $13. At only start last preparation 5th of 9 at Kempton Park on December 27 over 3200m, 28 len behind Maestro Conti with 70kg at $41. Hard to get excited about his chances.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at this track October 31 over 2800m, 6 len behind Dance Time with 58.5kg at $1.90. Previous preparation first-up favourite; to post a big 9 len win. This track October 16 over 2800m defeating Yurinov with 60.5kg at $2.80. In the right race and sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Reared leaving the stalls and slowly away as a result.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 8 at this track on March 11 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Velvet Red with 61kg at $23. Last start 2nd of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 31 over 2800m, 2 len behind Tuba with 62kg at $8.50. Cherry-ripe now and sure to be very competitive.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after about 18 months 5th of 10 at this track on April 5 over 2400m, 8 len behind Jack Andrea carrying 60.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on January 22 2024 over 1400m, 8 len behind Only In Jakarta with 64.5kg at $41. Rates highly and should do much better.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 7th of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 31 over 2800m, 6 len behind Tuba with 60kg at $26.
